design_philosophy.core_loop: Select plays, execute offensive/defensive strategies, manage field position and scoring across four quarters of simulated American football
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Strategic play-calling and execution versus opponent AI; balancing risk/reward in play selection and field conditions
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Coaching and quarterbacking an NFL team; experiencing authentic football strategy and mechanics on home console
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Pivoted from previous Madden's emphasis on realism toward arcade action and fun; prioritized accessible gameplay over simulation complexity. Revolutionary camera perspective (above and behind QB rather than sideline view) was a deliberate design choice that became industry standard.

difficulty.checkpointing: Password-based save system for console versions
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Players could adjust field conditions and select audibles (pre-snap adjustments) to modify play execution difficulty

progression.unlock_mechanism: All-Madden bonus team unlocked through progression or achievement
replayability_hooks: 16 generic NFL-based teams (Genesis version) with different play styles
Password saves enabling multiple save files

world_building_techniques: Generic team names and colors representing real 1990 NFL cities

faction_indicators: Play style preferences (aggressive vs. defensive strategies)
environmental_storytelling: Field conditions (weather, turf type) affecting gameplay and strategic choices
Stadium presentation distinguishing teams through visual identity

sources_used: Wikipedia - John Madden Football (1990 video game)
